name: DoIP_TCPSend
title: DoIP_TCPSend
syntax: long DoIP_TCPSend(dword payloadType, byte payload[], dword payloadLen);
long DoIP_TCPSend(dword protocolID, dword payloadType, byte payload[], dword payloadLen);
description: Sends a DoIP PDU with valid layout on the open TCP connection.

parameters.name: protocolD
parameters.description: If given, this will replace the configured protocol version in the DoIP PDU.[0; 255]

parameters.name: payloadType
parameters.description: Type to send, i.e. this can be any value.[0; 0xFFFF]

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The data following the generic DoIP header.

parameters.name: payloadLen
parameters.description: Length of the data following the header.

return: Error code, e.g. connection not established yet.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
